nodes.itemHTML: • Base64 decoder/encoder — Online free tool for decoding & encoding data.
• Saltcornstars301 - Open source no-code builder for web datatabase applications. Server and drag-and-drop UI builder, data stored in PostgreSQL or SQLite.

• Hands-on Elixir & OTP: Cryptocurrency trading bot - Want to learn Elixir & OTP by creating a real-world project? With Hands-on Elixir & OTP: Cryptocurrency trading bot you will gain hands-on experience by working on an interesting software project. We will explore all the key abstractions and essential principles through iterative implementation improvements. (2021).

• FEDOTstars93: An AutoML framework for the automated design of composite modeling pipelines. It can handle classification, regression, and time series forecasting tasks on different types of data (including multi-modal datasets).

• SPAdesstars324 - SPAdes (St. Petersburg genome assembler) is an assembly toolkit containing various assembly pipelines and the de-facto standard for prokaryotic genome assemblies.

• SKESAstars63 - SKESA is a de-novo sequence read assembler for microbial genomes. It uses conservative heuristics and is designed to create breaks at repeat regions in the genome. This leads to excellent sequence quality without significantly compromising contiguity.
• Prokkastars479 - Prokka: rapid prokaryotic genome annotation. Prokka is one of the most cited annotation command line tools for microbial genome annotations.

• Baktastars73 - Bakta is a tool for the rapid & standardized annotation of bacterial genomes & plasmids. It provides dbxref-rich and sORF-including annotations in machine-readable JSON & bioinformatics standard file formats for automatic downstream analysis.
• typing_utilsstars4 - Backport 3.8+ runtime typing utils(for eg: get_origin) & add issubtype & more.
• pico8-deploystars14 - An easy way to export and deploy PICO-8 projects to itch.io
• Strava - API for a popular tracking app for runners and cyclists. Data can be used to understand active transportation usage and patterns.
• septumstars10 - An interactive context-based text search tool for searching large codebases.
• Geopandas - GeoPandas is an open source project to make working with geospatial data in python easier. GeoPandas extends the datatypes used by pandas to allow spatial operations on geometric types.
• Partridge - Partridge is a Python 3.6+ library for working with GTFS feeds using pandas DataFrames.
• go-swagger-uistars1 - Go library containing precompiled Swagger UI for serving swagger json.
